# devhelm_status_page (Data Source)

Look up a DevHelm status page by slug.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "devhelm_status_page" "public" {
  slug = "acme"
}

resource "devhelm_status_page_component" "api" {
  status_page_id = data.devhelm_status_page.public.id
  name           = "Public API"
  type           = "MONITOR"
  monitor_id     = devhelm_monitor.api.id
}

output "page_url" {
  description = "Public URL where customers see this status page."
  value       = data.devhelm_status_page.public.page_url
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `slug` (String) URL slug to look up

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Status page description
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the page is enabled
- `id` (String) Unique identifier
- `incident_mode` (String) Incident mode
- `name` (String) Status page name
- `page_url` (String) Public URL of the status page
- `visibility` (String) Page visibility
